get.description: Retrieves all addresses of the authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates an address for the authenticated user.

post.description: Sets an address as the default address for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes an address for the authenticated user.

post.description: Uploads a profile image for the authenticated user.
